creator: martti.kuparinen@ericsson.com
text:
I installed FreeBSD 3.1 on my home PC and discovered that the
startup script for sshd could be better.

With these patches the /usr/local/etc/rc.d/sshd.sh has support
for "start", "stop" and "restart" options instead of just starting
sshd no matter what the argument is (as it was not used).

Fix: Apply the following patch as

# cd /usr/ports/security
# patch < /some/where/ssh.diff
